headline: Southern (SO) Stock Looks Fairly Priced Despite New Solar Program
summary: Southern has delivered a 91.7% return over the past 5 years, yet at around US$97.98 the stock now screens as about fairly priced on earnings multiples, while its broader valuation checks lean expensive rather than clearly cheap. A 91.7% return over 5 years suggests Southern has already rewarded patient shareholders, which can limit how much upside investors expect from here without a stronger earnings story. Efforts like Georgia Power's new CARES CIR solar subscription program may support...
